code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about a politician into a readable sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Group triples by subject for coherent sentence building
    subject_info = {}
    for t in triples:
        if t.subject not in subject_info:
            subject_info[t.subject] = []
        subject_info[t.subject].append(t)

    # Template mapping for common predicates with natural language
    templates = {
        "birthPlace": "was born in {obj}",
        "birthDate": "was born on {obj}",
        "birthYear": "was born in {obj}",
        "deathPlace": "died in {obj}",
        "deathDate": "died on {obj}",
        "deathYear": "died in {obj}",
        "nationality": "is a {obj} national",
        "party": "belongs to the {obj} party",
        "office": "held the office of {obj}",
        "successor": "was succeeded by {obj}",
        "predecessor": "was preceded by {obj}",
        "spouse": "was married to {obj}",
        "residence": "resides at {obj}",
        "region": "is from the region of {obj}",
        "country": "is from {obj}",
        "capital": "has capital {obj}",
        "largestCity": "has largest city {obj}",
        "currency": "uses {obj} as currency",
        "language": "speaks {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "has {obj} as official language",
        "leader": "is led by {obj}",
        "battle": "participated in {obj}",
        "almaMater": "graduated from {obj}",
        "profession": "worked as {obj}",
        "religion": "follows {obj}",
        "militaryBranch": "served in {obj}",
        "militaryRank": "held rank of {obj}",
        "unit": "served in {obj}",
        "activeYearsStartDate": "started active service in {obj}",
        "activeYearsEndDate": "ended active service in {obj}",
        "serviceStartYear": "began service in {obj}",
        "state": "is from state {obj}",
        "hasDeputy": "had {obj} as deputy",
        "inOfficeWhileVicePresident": "served while {obj} was Vice President",
        "inOfficeWhilePrimeMinister": "served while {obj} was Prime Minister",
        "inOfficeWhilePresident": "served while {obj} was President",
        "inOfficeWhileGovernor": "served while {obj} was Governor",
        "inOfficeWhileMonarch": "served while {obj} was Monarch",
        "award": "received the {obj} award",
        "numberOfVotesAttained": "received {obj} votes",
        "default": "{pred} {obj}"
    }

    # Build complex sentences from grouped triples
    result_parts = []
    for subject, subject_triples in subject_info.items():
        if len(subject_triples) == 1:
            t = subject_triples[0]
            tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate, templates["default"])
            result_parts.append(f"{subject} {tmpl.format(obj=t.object)}")
        else:
            # Build a complex sentence for multiple facts about same subject
            clauses = []
            for t in subject_triples:
                tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate, templates["default"])
                clauses.append(tmpl.format(obj=t.object))

            if clauses:
                # Combine clauses with commas and conjunctions
                main_clause = f"{subject} {clauses[0]}"
                if len(clauses) > 1:
                    additional_clauses = ", ".join(clauses[1:-1])
                    if len(clauses) > 2:
                        main_clause = f"{main_clause}, {additional_clauses}, and {clauses[-1]}"
                    else:
                        main_clause = f"{main_clause}, and {clauses[1]}"
                result_parts.append(main_clause)

    # Join all subject sentences into one coherent paragraph
    if len(result_parts) == 1:
        return result_parts[0]
    elif len(result_parts) == 2:
        return f"{result_parts[0]}; {result_parts[1]}"
    else:
        return ". ".join(result_parts) + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
